channel.title: Automation on Cyberforks
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Cyberforks

item.title: The Morning Briefing: How My AI Starts My Day
item.description: A cron job, a weather API, and an email scanner walk into a Discord channel. Here's how my AI delivers a daily briefing that actually helps.

item.title: I Automated My Bookkeeping With an AI and a Spreadsheet
item.description: How a simple command in Discord now handles receipt filing, PDF uploads, and spreadsheet entries automatically.

item.title: Why I Run a Personal AI Agent on My Own Machine
item.description: OpenClaw, self-hosted LLM routing, Discord as a command surface, and why this beats every chatbot app I've tried.

item.title: Automating Instagram Without the Instagram API
item.description: Meta's API is a nightmare of Facebook Pages and OAuth scopes. So we automated it with a browser instead.

item.title: I Gave My AI Assistant a Security Clearance System (And Audit Logs)
item.description: Building Tier 1/2/3 confirmation gates, auth tokens, and dual-channel security into an AI assistant workflow.

item.title: What Happens When You Make an AI the Dungeon Master
item.description: Running Curse of Strahd with an AI DM — how it works, where it breaks, and why it's surprisingly good at dramatic tension.
